content.text:
<user_query>

In the motion_rl codebase at /Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl, find:

1. The list of DOF names (joint names) for the R01 robot. Search for `dof_names` assignments, `dof_names_list`, or any ordered list of joint names in configuration files, env files, or URDF-related configs. Check files like:
   - humanoid-gym/humanoid/envs/r01_amp/ directory
   - humanoid-gym/resources/robots/ directory
   - Any config files with joint name lists
   
2. The list of reward names used in RL training. Search for `reward_names`, `reward_scales`, or reward function definitions. Check:
   - humanoid-gym/humanoid/envs/ directory for reward configs
   - Any task config files

3. The existing PlotJuggler XML layout at humanoid-gym/datasets/tool/config/r01_plus_amp_plotjuggler_limit_inspect.xml - read its full contents.

Return the complete ordered lists of DOF names, reward names, and the full XML content.
</user_query>

Here are the findings:

---

## 1. R01 DOF names (joint order)

The R01 Plus with 4-DoF arms uses this joint order. It appears in:

- `isaacsim_ws/isaacsim/include/r01_config_openchain.py` (lines 274–297)
- `r01_plus_amp_config.py` and `r01_v111_amp_config_with_arms.py` (default_joint_angles, stiffness, etc.)

**Ordered DOF list (23 joints):**

| Index | DOF Name |
|-------|----------|
| 0 | leg_l_joint1 |
| 1 | leg_l_joint2 |
| 2 | leg_l_joint3 |
| 3 | leg_l_joint4 |
| 4 | leg_l_joint5 |
| 5 | leg_l_joint6 |
| 6 | leg_r_joint1 |
| 7 | leg_r_joint2 |
| 8 | leg_r_joint3 |
| 9 | leg_r_joint4 |
| 10 | leg_r_joint5 |
| 11 | leg_r_joint6 |
| 12 | waist_yaw |
| 13 | waist_roll |
| 14 | waist_pitch |
| 15 | arm_L_joint1 |
| 16 | arm_L_joint2 |
| 17 | arm_L_joint3 |
| 18 | arm_L_joint4 |
| 19 | arm_R_joint1 |
| 20 | arm_R_joint2 |
| 21 | arm_R_joint3 |
| 22 | arm_R_joint4 |

Note: `r01_v111` uses `waist_joint1`, `waist_joint2`, `waist_joint3` and `arm_l_joint1`–`arm_r_joint4` (lowercase `l`/`r`). In humanoid-gym, `dof_names` come from `gym.get_asset_dof_names(robot_asset)` and follow the URDF order.

---

## 2. Reward names used in RL training

From `humanoid-gym/humanoid/envs/r01_amp/r01_amp_config.py` (lines 287–314), `reward_names` are built from `reward_scales` (non-zero only, excluding `termination`).

**Ordered reward names (R01AMPCfg / R01PlusAMPCfg):**

1. tracking_avg_lin_vel  
2. tracking_avg_ang_vel  
3. torques  
4. dof_acc  
5. action_rate  
6. foot_distance_limit  
7. stand_still  
8. torque_limits  
9. dof_vel_limits  
10. dof_pos_limits  
11. feet_contact_forces  
12. torque_rate  

Scales set to 0 (and thus not in `reward_names`): termination, tracking_lin_vel, tracking_ang_vel, lin_vel_z, ang_vel_xy, orientation, dof_vel, base_height, feet_air_time, collision, feet_stumble, default_joint_pos, energy, torques_percent, feet_vel.

---

## 3. PlotJuggler XML layout

Full contents of `humanoid-gym/datasets/tool/config/r01_plus_amp_plotjuggler_limit_inspect.xml`:

```xml
    <DockSplitter orientation="-" sizes="1" count="1">

      <DockSplitter orientation="-" sizes="0.166798;0.166798;0.166008;0.166798;0.166798;0.166798" count="6">
       <DockArea name="left leg: joint 1">
        <plot flip_x="false" style="Lines" mode="TimeSeries" flip_y="false">
         <range right="58.913039" left="28.915454" bottom="-1.483650" top="1.483650"/>
         <limitY/>
         <curve color="#9467bd" name="/learning_data/joint_positions[0]"/>

  <Tab containers="1" tab_name="waist joint limit">
   <Container>
    <DockSplitter orientation="-" sizes="0.333596;0.332808;0.333596" count="3">

 <!-- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -->
 <!-- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -->

</root>
```

The layout has three tabs: **leg joint limit** (left/right leg joints 0–11), **waist joint limit** (yaw/roll/pitch 12–14), and **arm joint state** (left arm 15–18, right arm 19–22). Signals use `/learning_data/joint_positions[i]` and `/learning_data/dof_pos_limits[i][0/1]`.
